mnemonics: MODULE PICK-5: Select one FULL question from each MODULE to score a high FIVE.
keyPoints: You must answer one complete, multi-part question from Module 5.
Do not mix and match parts of questions from different modules.
Ensure your chosen question comprehensively covers the module's key themes.
commonMistakes: Answering only part of a question (e.g., only 5a but not 5b).
Selecting questions from the wrong module (e.g., answering a Module 4 question in the Module 5 section).
Choosing a question that doesn't allow you to fully demonstrate your knowledge of the module.
